requirement_topic.en: Sweden Svenska kraftnät / Ei Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, SS-EN 50549, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 瑞典Svenska kraftnät / Ei并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727、SS-EN 50549及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 瑞典Svenska kraftnät / Ei併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727、SS-EN 50549及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Sweden should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to the relevant DSO connection review and the national grid code set by Svenska kraftnät (the transmission system operator), with sector oversight by the Energy Markets Inspectorate (Ei). The practical evidence package normally includes SS-EN 50549-1/-2 grid-code compliance, IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Sweden's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Sweden uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Sweden is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Sweden is a cold-climate Nordic market, so commissioning files should also document low-temperature operation, thermal derating, and snow/ice assumptions for the installed site.
summary.zh: 瑞典并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受相关配电网运营商（DSO）接入审查及由Svenska kraftnät（输电系统运营商）设定的国家电网规程，并由能源市场监察局（Ei）监管。实际证据包通常包括SS-EN 50549-1/-2电网规程合规、IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。瑞典与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：瑞典为单相230 V、三相400 V，而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。瑞典是寒冷气候的北欧市场，调试文件还应记录安装现场的低温运行、热降额和积雪/结冰假设。
summary.zht: 瑞典併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受相關配電網運營商（DSO）接入審查及由Svenska kraftnät（輸電系統運營商）設定的國家電網規程，並由能源市場監察局（Ei）監管。實際證據包通常包括SS-EN 50549-1/-2電網規程合規、IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。瑞典與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：瑞典為單相230 V、三相400 V，而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。瑞典是寒冷氣候的北歐市場，調試文件還應記錄安裝現場的低溫運行、熱降額和積雪／結冰假設。

standards_or_laws: SS-EN 50549-1 / SS-EN 50549-2 — requirements for generating plants connected to distribution networks (SIS adoption; Swedish grid-code reference)
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Svenska kraftnät grid-code requirements and DSO project grid-connection / commissioning requirements
Energy Markets Inspectorate (Ei) electricity-sector oversight requirements where applicable
Sweden low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Sweden's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to Svenska kraftnät / DSO acceptance or Ei oversight in Sweden.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非瑞典50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO认可或Ei监督证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非瑞典50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO認可或Ei監督證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Sweden Svenska kraftnät / DSO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare SS-EN 50549-1/-2 grid-code evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Sweden-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Sweden voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For Nordic cold-climate sites, include low-temperature operation, snow/ice loading, thermal derating, earthing, surge protection, and weak-grid ride-through assumptions in the project file, with Swedish-language documentation where expected.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO项目验收。出口商应准备SS-EN 50549-1/-2电网规程证据、IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、瑞典专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称瑞典电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。对于北欧寒冷气候现场，项目文件应包括低温运行、积雪/结冰荷载、热降额、接地、浪涌保护和弱电网穿越假设，并在需要时提供瑞典语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO項目驗收。出口商應準備SS-EN 50549-1/-2電網規程證據、IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、瑞典專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱瑞典電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。對於北歐寒冷氣候現場，項目文件應包括低溫運行、積雪／結冰荷載、熱降額、接地、浪湧保護和弱電網穿越假設，並在需要時提供瑞典語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through DSO technical review and the Svenska kraftnät grid code (overseen by Ei); SS-EN 50549 is the applicable grid-code standard adopted by SIS
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a Svenska kraftnät / DSO Sweden approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Sweden Svenska kraftnät / DSO grid-connection review. Prepare SS-EN 50549-1/-2, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Sweden's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document cold-climate low-temperature operation and thermal derating for Nordic installation. Verify current Svenska kraftnät, DSO, and Ei project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO并网审查。请准备SS-EN 50549-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录北欧安装的寒冷气候低温运行和热降额。出货或调试前请直接核实现行Svenska kraftnät、DSO和Ei项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足瑞典Svenska kraftnät / DSO併網審查。請準備SS-EN 50549-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄北歐安裝的寒冷氣候低溫運行和熱降額。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行Svenska kraftnät、DSO和Ei項目要求。
